SIEGFRIEDSABER-LINDEN_LEAF.title: Linden Leaf
SIEGFRIEDSABER-LINDEN_LEAF.description: #At the start of each combat, gain 2 Dragon Scales. The first attack that reaches you each turn ignores them. When a reduced attack still deals 1 or more damage, gain 5 NP Charge (up to 3 times per turn).
SIEGFRIEDSABER-LINDEN_LEAF.flavor: A single leaf clung to his back as he bathed in the dragon's blood. One palm of skin the blood never touched — and a hero's only death.
SIEGFRIEDSABER-DAS_RHEINGOLD.title: Das Rheingold
SIEGFRIEDSABER-DAS_RHEINGOLD.description: #The first NP card you play each turn: gain 20 Critical Stars and draw 1.
SIEGFRIEDSABER-DAS_RHEINGOLD.flavor: The hoard the dragon coiled around. He took the gold the way he took everything — by walking straight into the fire.
SIEGFRIEDSABER-FAFNIR_HEARTBLOOD.title: Fafnir's Heartblood
SIEGFRIEDSABER-FAFNIR_HEARTBLOOD.descrip: #Each turn, when an attack pierces your Dragon Scales (your exposed back costs you HP), the wound is baptized: gain 20 NP Charge.
SIEGFRIEDSABER-FAFNIR_HEARTBLOOD.flavor: He bathed in the slain dragon's heartblood until his skin was scales. Where the blood reaches, the dragon answers — even his own wounds sharpen the blade.
